items.title: DR Congo declares national holiday after reaching World Cup for first time in 52 years
items.dek: This is just the second time that DR Congo have reached the World Cup finals, sparking celebrations in Kinshasa.
items.body: This is just the second time that DR Congo have reached the World Cup finals, sparking celebrations in Kinshasa.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mass robotaxi malfunction halts traffic in Chinese city
items.dek: Baidu has not responded to a request for comment about the outage, which affected at least 100 cars.
items.body: Baidu has not responded to a request for comment about the outage, which affected at least 100 cars.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran war economic shocks will last 'months', say Australia's PM
items.dek: Anthony Albanese used a rare TV address to tell Australians that the "months ahead may not be easy" amid the global effects of the war.
items.body: Anthony Albanese used a rare TV address to tell Australians that the "months ahead may not be easy" amid the global effects of the war.
items.author: IriLine Desk
